message:
refactor(tests/storage): migrate 5 rusqlite seed sites to frankensqlite (uiojh)

The five schema-migration tests in tests/storage.rs seeded a legacy
DB via rusqlite::Connection + execute_batch, then opened it with
FrankenStorage to verify the migration path. Every one of those seed
sites used plain CREATE TABLE + INSERT — zero writable_schema, zero
sqlite_master DML — so fsqlite handles them identically. Per AGENTS.md
Rule 2, migrated in place.

Sites:
  - migration_from_v1_requires_rebuild (line 648)
  - migration_from_v2_preserves_data (line 754)
  - migration_from_v3_adds_sources_table (line 1125)
  - migration_adds_provenance_columns_to_conversations (line 1368)
  - future_schema_version_requires_rebuild (line 1489)

Each 'use rusqlite::Connection' flips to 'use frankensqlite::
Connection'; each Connection::open(&db_path) flips to
Connection::open(db_path.to_string_lossy().into_owned()) per
frankensqlite's impl Into<String> signature. execute_batch is an
inherent method on frankensqlite::Connection so no new trait imports
needed.

VERIFICATION:
cargo test --test storage migration_from: 3/3 pass.
cargo test --test storage future: 1/1 pass.
cargo test --test storage: 63 pass / 7 pre-existing failures (the
fts_messages-absent class from V14 migration, verified unrelated on
prior commits).
cargo check --tests: green in 30s.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-uiojh. Remaining test-
rusqlite references are now intentional (frankensqlite-vs-rusqlite
oracle tests in parity suite, writable_schema corruption injection in
e2e_search_index, and the test-fixture helper in src/storage/sqlite.rs
that still needs mot85's upstream feature work).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
